headline: Virgin Galactic Appoints Megan Prichard as Chief Growth Officer
summary: ORANGE COUNTY, Calif., March 23, 2026--Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPCE) ("Virgin Galactic" or the "Company"), a leader in commercial spaceflight and advanced aerospace technology, today announced the appointment of Megan Prichard as its new Chief Growth Officer (CGO), effective April 6.

headline: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
summary: Grab will acquire Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda business in Taiwan for $600 million, expanding beyond Southeast Asia and setting up a closer challenge to Uber Eats in a tightly contested market.

headline: Exclusive: Rivian CEO on how its Uber deal came together, and why the AI 'driver' is the future of mobility
summary: Rivian and Uber recently completed a $1.25 billion deal for up to 50,000 R2 robotaxis. Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe told Yahoo Finance how the deal unfolded and why he thinks AI 'drivers' are the future of mobility.

headline: Uber Is Quietly Expanding Into a Multitrillion-Dollar Market
